title: acacia armata var. ornithophora
intro: Acacia armata var. ornithophora, also known as the spear thorn or ornithophora thorn acacia, is a variety of tree found in Africa and the Middle East, characterized by its sharp thorns and deciduous foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Acacia armata var. ornithophora include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its use as an antihelmintic agent to combat intestinal parasites. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be made by infusing the bark and leaves in hot water or oil.
